description: Deterministic validation contract for NCC PDF ingestion and XML-linked validation.

representation_model.alignment_dependency: PDF-to-XML alignment can only support semantic progression when the paired XML source has passed its gate and alignment evidence remains within configured thresholds.

status_model.PASS: All blocking rules pass and no warning outcomes remain.
status_model.PASS_WITH_WARNINGS: All blocking rules pass and only bounded warning outcomes remain.
status_model.REVIEW_REQUIRED: The PDF output is structurally usable but requires review before semantic progression.
status_model.FAIL: Validation completed and the PDF output did not satisfy contract requirements.
status_model.BLOCKED: A blocking rule prevents progression to the semantic layer.

rules.description: The PDF must be text-based and parseable enough to support deterministic extraction.
The PDF must be split to the required section-level scope before canonical ingestion proceeds.
Every extracted fragment must retain a bounding box, type, page reference, and stable fragment identity.
rules.pass_when: fragments.total > 0 AND fragments.missing_bbox <= thresholds.max_missing_bbox AND fragments.untyped == thresholds.max_untyped_fragments AND fragments.missing_page_reference == 0 AND fragments.missing_fragment_id == 0
rules.block_when: fragments.total == 0 OR fragments.missing_bbox > thresholds.max_missing_bbox OR fragments.untyped > thresholds.max_untyped_fragments OR fragments.missing_page_reference > 0 OR fragments.missing_fragment_id > 0

rules.description: Extracted PDF tables must preserve row structure and usable header information where present.
rules.pass_when: tables.invalid_count <= thresholds.max_invalid_tables AND tables.empty_row_sets == 0 AND tables.missing_headers_where_expected == 0
rules.block_when: tables.invalid_count > thresholds.max_invalid_tables OR tables.empty_row_sets > 0 OR tables.missing_headers_where_expected > 0

rules.description: PDF fragments must align to the paired XML representation with sufficient confidence and bounded unresolved mappings.
rules.pass_when: xml_validation.can_progress_to_alignment_layer == true AND alignment.unresolved == 0 AND alignment.low_confidence == 0 AND alignment.average_confidence >= thresholds.preferred_alignment_confidence
rules.warn_when: xml_validation.can_progress_to_alignment_layer == true AND alignment.average_confidence >= thresholds.min_alignment_confidence_for_warning AND alignment.unresolved <= thresholds.max_unresolved_alignments_for_warning AND alignment.low_confidence <= thresholds.max_low_confidence_alignments_for_warning
rules.block_when: xml_validation.can_progress_to_alignment_layer != true OR alignment.average_confidence < thresholds.min_alignment_confidence_for_warning OR alignment.unresolved > thresholds.max_unresolved_alignments_for_warning OR alignment.low_confidence > thresholds.max_low_confidence_alignments_for_warning

rules.description: Fragments must carry sufficient metadata to support clause traceability, page provenance, and XML relationship lookup.
Overall PDF ingestion quality score must meet the configured threshold before semantic progression.
